# Alexi

A kitesurfing-focused business with an adventurous, outdoor spirit centered around water sports. The brand likely evokes energy, freedom, and the thrill of riding wind and waves.

Source: https://example.com

---

# Chase the Wind.Ride the Freedom. Test by Ido


### Alexi is your gateway to world-class kitesurfing — offering expert lessons, guided coastal adventures, and unforgettable sessions for every rider.


Get in Touch
Lessons & Trips













## Featured Products

## Shop by Category


Loading products...










## Why Ride With Alexi


We combine safety, skill-building, and memorable coastal sessions to create a genuine kitesurfing experience far beyond generic tourism. Every session is crafted around you, the wind, and the water.










### Beginner-Friendly Progression


From your first body drag to your first independent ride, our structured approach builds confidence safely. We break down every skill into manageable steps so you progress at your own pace without feeling overwhelmed.











### Local Wind & Water Knowledge


Our instructors live and breathe these coastal conditions. We know exactly when the thermals kick in, where the flat-water lagoons hide, and how to read the gusts — giving you the safest and most exhilarating ride every session.











### Small-Group Adventure Energy


Forget crowded tourist classes. We keep groups intentionally small to maximize your time on the water, foster real camaraderie, and tailor coaching to your individual style. It's not just a lesson — it's a shared adventure.




























## Where Wind Meets Water


Three distinct experiences, each a chapter of the ocean. From your first powered ride to mastering open-water swells, discover the session that matches your spirit.














### Guided Downwind Coastal Rides


Follow the coastline on a curated downwinder. You'll ride wind shadows past hidden coves and sea stacks, with a support boat tracking your line. Perfect for intermediate riders craving distance and discovery.












### Open-Water Lessons


Start where the wind is steady and the water is flat. Our certified instructors use radio helmets and jet-ski support so you progress safely from body dragging to your first board starts.












### Weekend Escape Sessions


Disconnect completely. We handle logistics, tides, and wind forecasts so you can focus on riding. Camp under the stars, wake up to offshore breeze, and ride empty lineups all weekend.


















## Riders Speak, Wind Listens


Real stories from the Alexi community — where every session builds confidence, connection, and a deep respect for the water.












### Maya, First-Time Kiter


I arrived terrified of the open water. The Alexi team broke everything down with such patience that by day three I was riding upwind and laughing. It’s not just a school — it’s a confidence lab with salt spray.












### Leo, Seasoned Rider


I’ve kited across three continents, and Alexi’s spot knowledge is next-level. They matched me with gear that felt like an extension of my body. The downwinder they recommended was the most scenic session of my life.












### Clara, Ocean Advocate


Finding a white river kayaking & outdoors crew that genuinely cares about the coastline is rare. Alexi’s eco-briefings and clean-up dives made me feel like part of a tribe, not just a tourist. I’ll be back every season.







Ready to write your own story on the water? Let’s find your perfect session.

Contact Alexi

## Master the Waves: Kitesurf &amp; Kayak Lessons — Alexi

URL: https://example.com/lessons-trips
Description: Unlock your potential with expert-led kitesurfing and white river kayaking lessons. Book your trip now and turn wild water into your personal playground with Alexi.

Master the Waves: Kitesurf & Kayak Lessons — Alexi













































Skip to main content

















- Products Products







- Home
- Lessons & Trips
- About Alexi
- Contact
0













Products














# Your Kitesurfing Journey Starts Here


At Alexi, we believe every rider's path is unique. From your very first launch to confident, independent sessions, our structured progression takes you step by step through the fundamentals. For travelers seeking an unforgettable coastal adventure, our guided outings reveal the best wind and waves the region has to offer.









### Structured Progression


Learn at your own pace with a clear, safety-first curriculum designed to build water confidence and technical skill from the ground up.










### Prime Wind Windows


We time every session around optimal conditions, matching your ability to the perfect breeze for an exhilarating, safe ride.










### Guided Coastal Adventures


Explore hidden lagoons and pristine beaches with local experts who know every tide and sandbank, turning a lesson into a memory.

























## Our Kitesurfing Services


Whether you're chasing your first ride or refining advanced tricks, Alexi offers tailored experiences that match your skill level and sense of adventure. Discover the ocean with us.








### Beginner Discovery


First Contact with Wind & Water


Perfect for newcomers who want to experience the thrill of kitesurfing in a safe, controlled environment. You'll learn fundamental theory, kite control on the beach, and your first body drags through crystal-clear shallows.



2.5 hour introductory session


All equipment included & beach-ready


Max 2 students per instructor


Calm, waist-deep learning zones


Start Your Journey






### Progression Coaching


Ride Upwind & Unlock Tricks


Designed for riders who can water-start but want to master upwind riding, transitions, and their first jumps. Our coaches use radio helmets and video analysis to accelerate your learning curve dramatically.



Personalized 1-on-1 coaching


Radio helmet communication


Video debrief after each session


Focus on upwind & first jumps


Level Up






### Guided Coastal Sessions


Explore Wild Shorelines


Join our guided downwinders and coastal explorations for independent riders. We take you to secret spots, pristine lagoons, and wave-riding playgrounds that only locals know, all while keeping safety and stoke at the forefront.



Half-day & full-day adventures


Boat-supported downwinders


Discover hidden kitesurf spots


Small groups of 4-6 riders


Join an Adventure











## How We Guide Your Journey


A simple, reassuring path from your first thought of white river kayaking & outdoors to riding with confidence. Every step is built around your level and the day's conditions.













### Meet Your Level


We start with a quick chat and a look at your experience. Whether you're a complete beginner or already comfortable with kite control, we'll match you to the right lesson plan or guided trip.











### Read Wind & Spot Conditions


Before you touch the water, we'll teach you to understand the wind window, tide, and local weather. This knowledge is the foundation of safe, thrilling sessions and is part of every Alexi experience.











### Build Confidence on Water


With a clear plan and real-time feedback, you'll progress from body dragging to water starts and sustained rides. Our instructors stay close, using radio helmets so you feel supported at every moment.











### Continue with Guided Progression


After your session, we'll map out your next steps. Whether it's mastering transitions, learning to jump, or joining a downwinder trip, your progression stays on track with the Alexi community behind you.



























## Why Ride with Alexi


We believe kitesurfing is more than a sport — it's a connection to wind, water, and wild places. Our lessons are built around you, the environment, and the unforgettable feeling of gliding across the sea.










### Personal Coaching


One-on-one guidance tailored to your skill level, from first water start to advanced tricks. Our certified instructors focus on safety, progression, and pure stoke.











### Environmental Respect


We ride with deep respect for the ocean. Every lesson includes awareness of local ecosystems, tides, and sustainable practices to protect the playground we love.











### Memorable Immersion


Beyond the lesson, it's an experience. Feel the salt spray, watch the sunset from the water, and take home stories that last long after the wind dies down.

















## Not sure which lesson or trip fits your level?


Every rider starts somewhere different. Whether you're chasing your first water start or hunting the next big downwinder, our team will match you with the perfect session for your skills and goals. Let's talk about where you want the wind to take you.


Ask Us Anything

















Ride the wind. Chase the horizon. Your ultimate kitesurfing adventure starts here.

## Meet the Force Behind Alexi&#39;s Outdoor Spirit — Alexi

URL: https://example.com/about
Description: Discover the passion of Alexi Cheyenne Figueroa and the relentless drive to share white river kayaking and kitesurfing freedom. Get inspired by our story and join the adventure.

Meet the Force Behind Alexi's Outdoor Spirit — Alexi













































Skip to main content

















- Products Products







- Home
- Lessons & Trips
- About Alexi
- Contact
0

















# Born from wind, shaped by the sea


Alexi isn't just a kitesurfing brand — it's a way of moving through the world. We believe the best adventures begin where the ocean meets the sky, and that every gust of wind carries the promise of something extraordinary. Our story is written in salt spray and sand, in the quiet moments before dawn when the tide is right and the breeze begins to stir.


Rooted in a deep respect for the elements, we craft experiences that feel both thrilling and grounded. Whether you're chasing your first ride or perfecting a freestyle trick, Alexi is here to guide you — with integrity, passion, and a genuine love for the wild, beautiful world of white river kayaking & outdoors.





Products





















## Our Core Values







### Respect for Wind & Water


We believe the ocean is our greatest teacher. Every session at Alexi starts with understanding the elements — reading the wind, respecting the tide, and moving in harmony with nature rather than against it. This reverence shapes every lesson, every trip, and every piece of advice we share.







### Honest Progression Over Hype


We don't promise overnight miracles. Real progression on the water comes from deliberate practice, expert coaching, and a supportive community. At Alexi, we celebrate the small wins — your first water start, your first upwind ride — because we know that lasting confidence is built step by step, not through empty marketing.







### Adventure with Responsibility


Thrill-seeking means nothing without safety. We equip every guest with the skills, gear checks, and environmental awareness needed to explore confidently. From our white river kayaking & outdoors expeditions to coastal kitesurfing camps, we ensure that adventure and responsibility go hand in hand — so you can push your limits without compromising your wellbeing.

















## Built on Wind, Water & Trust




12+

Seasons chasing the perfect wind. Deep local knowledge from years riding these exact lagoons and beaches.




4:1

Maximum student-to-instructor ratio. We keep groups small so you get real feedback, not just a loudspeaker.




100%

Safety-first ethos. IKO-certified instruction, premium equipment checks, and constant weather monitoring.




94%

Of our guests return or send a friend. That's the trust signal we're proudest of at Alexi.















## Moments in Motion


A curated glimpse into Alexi's world: windy shorelines, setup moments, board tracks, and riders in motion. This is where the adventure lives — raw, cinematic, and always chasing the next gust.



































Testimonials


## Stories from the Water


Real experiences from our community of riders, explorers, and ocean lovers.
















### Marcus Rivera


Kitesurfing Instructor, Tarifa





"I've been teaching kitesurfing for over a decade, and discovering Alexi felt like finding a second home. The attention to detail in their gear recommendations, the deep knowledge of wind patterns, and the genuine warmth of the team made every session unforgettable. It's rare to find a brand that truly understands the soul of white river kayaking & outdoors adventure the way Alexi does."



★
★
★
★
★














### Elena Vasquez


Adventure Photographer, Cape Town





"What sets Alexi apart is the way they blend expertise with pure stoke. I traveled to three different spots with their recommended kit list, and every single piece performed flawlessly. Beyond the gear, it's the community they've built — a global family of riders who share the same passion for wind, waves, and the endless horizon. Alexi Cheyenne Figueroa has created something truly special here."



★

# Let's Ride Together

### Call Us

## Let's Ride Together


Tell us about your experience level, what kind of adventure you're dreaming of, and when you'd like to hit the water. We'll craft the perfect session for you.






Full Name



Email Address

## Frequently Asked Questions


Everything you need to know before your first session with Alexi







### Who are the sessions suitable for?


Our sessions are designed for everyone — from complete beginners taking their first steps into kitesurfing to experienced riders looking to refine advanced techniques. We tailor every session to your individual skill level and comfort in the water.






### What should I bring with me?


We provide all the essential gear including kites, boards, harnesses, and safety equipment. You just need to bring swimwear, a towel, sunscreen, and plenty of energy. A change of warm clothes for after the session is always a good idea.






### How does weather affect the planning?


Wind and weather are at the heart of kitesurfing. We monitor conditions daily and will confirm your session 24 hours in advance. If conditions aren't safe or suitable, we'll work with you to reschedule at no extra cost. Flexibility is key to the best experience.






### Are complete beginners welcome?


Absolutely. Most of our guests start with zero experience. Our beginner courses cover everything from safety theory and kite control on the beach to your first board starts in the water. You'll be amazed at how quickly you progress with the right guidance.






### What about safety and insurance?


Safety is our top priority. All instructors are internationally certified and carry first-aid training. We use premium, regularly inspected equipment. We recommend you have personal travel and activity insurance that covers water sports.






### How long is a typical session?


A standard session lasts around 2 to 3 hours including setup, briefing, and on-water time. We find this gives the perfect balance of learning and enjoyment without fatigue. Half-day and full-day packages are also available for those wanting a deeper dive.























## Every Adventure Starts With a Conversation


Whether you're chasing your first wind line or planning your next kite trip, Alexi is here to help you find the right next step. Reach out and let's turn your stoke into a plan.


Back to Home

## Return Policy

URL: https://example.com/return-policy
Description: Return policy - your rights for returns and exchanges

Return Policy - Alexi




































































- Products Products







- Home
- Lessons & Trips

- Contact
0












Products










# Return Policy


Last Updated: 6/13/2026



At Alexi, we want you to be satisfied with your purchase. This policy outlines your rights for returns and refunds.


## 1. Return Window


You may return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.


- Items must be unused and in original condition

- Items must be in original packaging

- Receipt or proof of purchase required




## 2. Non-Returnable Items


- Perishable goods

- Custom or personalized items

- Digital products and opened software

- Personal hygiene products that have been opened




## 3. Damaged or Defective Items


If you receive a damaged or defective item, contact us within 48 hours for a full refund including shipping costs.


## 4. Contact Us



For returns or questions:


Email: [business_email]


Phone: [business_phone]


Address: [business_address]

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://example.com/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy
















































- Products Products







- Home
- Lessons & Trips
- About Alexi
- Contact
0













Products











# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/4/2026



Alexi ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Alexi

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://example.com/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Products











# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 4, 2026



Alexi is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Alexi

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 4, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Alexi

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Water Sports / Outdoor Adventure provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Alexi provides Water Sports / Outdoor Adventure through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Alexi. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Alexi

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
